title: Simple Grapes
description:
Bouwflap's Simple Grapes Resourcepack.
Changes glowberries into grapes.
body:
# Simple Grapes Resourcepack
_Made By Bouwflap_


## What is Simple Grapes?

"Simple Grapes" is my first resource pack, created with a simple goal: to replace Glow Berries with Grapes, purely for aesthetic purposes. I made this change for my girlfriend, with whom I often travel and occasionally play Minecraft.

After a recent trip to Germany, we were inspired by the beautiful grapevine pergolas commonly seen around restaurants in the wine regions. It reignited our passion for building in Minecraft, but we felt that this particular detail was missing from the game.

I hope that fellow Minecrafters will appreciate this small change—whether for building, roleplaying, or any other creative purpose.

If you choose to reuse my textures in your own resource pack, please credit me by name.

### Image

![Grapes!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d153a31d50e6ac6f4e00fc0bc26920fd7dfcb82.png)
